channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Supreme Court's favorite branch of government is itself
item.description: This term, the Supreme Court sidelined Congress and concentrated power in the presidency and the judiciary.

item.title: Trump's birthright citizenship Plan B targets pregnant women at border
item.description: After losing the birthright citizenship case at the Supreme Court, Trump aides shifted to a new strategy: blocking pregnant women from entering the U.S.

item.title: Anthropic's Fable 5 returns after Trump administration lifts export controls
item.description: Anthropic's Fable 5 model came back online Wednesday after the Trump administration lifted an export control late Tuesday.

item.title: Trump admin criticizes Machado's 'grotesque political opportunism' after Venezuela quakes
item.description: Venezuelan opposition leader Maria Corina Machado's efforts to return home after devastating earthquakes have drawn criticism from the Trump administration.
